description: Design and implement a microservices migration plan for a monolithic e-commerce platform. The system has 200k daily active users, uses a PostgreSQL monolith with 80 tables, and must migrate to microservices with zero downtime. Produce: (1) service decomposition map, (2) data migration scripts, (3) API gateway configuration, (4) rollback plan.

Conduct a full security audit of a Node.js REST API codebase (3000 lines). Identify OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, produce a CVSS-scored report, and generate patched code for each finding. The audit must be consistent: no vulnerability can be reported as both critical and low risk.

Build an ETL pipeline specification for ingesting 50GB/day of IoT sensor data. Pipeline must: deduplicate records within 5-minute windows, handle schema drift, write to a partitioned Parquet store, and maintain a data quality score > 0.95. Produce: schema definitions, transformation logic, quality checks, and deployment manifest.

Synthesise a technical report on 'Attention mechanisms in transformers for time-series forecasting'. The report must: cover 15+ papers published 2021-2024, compare architectures consistently (no contradictory claims about the same paper), produce a benchmark comparison table, and conclude with 3 open research directions.

Refactor a 5000-line Python Django application to use async views throughout. All database calls must use async ORM (Django 4.1+). The refactored codebase must pass the original test suite (200 tests). Produce: refactored files, updated requirements.txt, migration guide.

Design a multi-region Kubernetes deployment for a SaaS product serving EU and US. Requirements: <50ms p99 latency in each region, GDPR data residency compliance, auto-scaling from 10 to 10000 pods, GitOps deployment via ArgoCD. Produce: Helm charts skeleton, network policy, autoscaling config, compliance checklist.

Design a production ML pipeline for customer churn prediction. Dataset: 2M rows, 120 features, 8% churn rate. Requirements: AUC-ROC > 0.85, inference latency < 20ms, monthly retraining schedule, model drift detection. Produce: feature engineering spec, model architecture decision, training config, serving config, monitoring setup.

Design a public REST API for a financial data platform. Must: follow OpenAPI 3.1 spec, support bulk operations (up to 1000 records/request), include rate limiting specs (1000 req/min), versioning strategy, auth (OAuth2 + API keys), and error taxonomy with 20+ error codes. Produce: OpenAPI YAML, auth flow diagram spec, rate limiting rules, SDK interface spec.

Conduct a post-mortem analysis of a 4-hour database outage that affected 50,000 users. Given: 3 pages of raw logs, metric graphs, and customer reports. Produce: (1) timeline of events with root cause, (2) contributing factors analysis, (3) 5 action items with owners and deadlines, (4) communication template. All facts must be consistent — no contradictory timelines.

Write a complete Product Requirements Document (PRD) for a real-time collaborative code editor (think Google Docs for code). Must cover: user personas (3+), feature list (20+ features), technical constraints, success metrics, non-functional requirements, and a 12-week phased rollout plan. All sections must be internally consistent.

Map a healthcare SaaS application's data flows against HIPAA Privacy Rule and Security Rule requirements. For each of the 18 PHI identifiers, document: where it is stored, how it is transmitted, encryption method, access controls, and audit log presence. Produce a gap analysis and remediation roadmap.

Design a distributed rate limiter that can handle 1M requests/second across 100 nodes with eventual consistency guarantees. The design must address: token bucket algorithm implementation, Redis cluster synchronisation, edge case handling (node failure during window reset), and performance proof. Produce: architecture spec, pseudocode, failure mode analysis.

Convert a 2000-line synchronous Python data processing script to use asyncio with concurrent.futures for CPU-bound tasks. Identify I/O-bound vs CPU-bound sections, apply appropriate concurrency primitives, and validate correctness with property-based tests. Target: 3x throughput improvement.

Design a real-time fraud detection pipeline for a payment processor handling 5000 TPS. Requirements: p99 latency < 100ms end-to-end, false positive rate < 0.1%, model explainability for regulatory compliance, feature store for real-time feature serving. Produce: pipeline architecture, feature definitions, model selection rationale, explainability approach.

Evaluate three backend technology choices (Go/Rust/Node.js) for a new high-throughput trading system. The evaluation must be technically consistent — no recommendation can contradict an earlier stated constraint. Produce: comparison matrix (12 criteria), performance benchmarks spec, operational cost estimate, final recommendation with justification.
